message.content:
<teammate-message teammate_id="team-lead" summary="Step 6 Projects ready for review">
Step 6 (Projects, US-GTD-4) is ready for review at commit 0143878. Luca reports local pipeline is green (CI pending).

Key files to review:
- `src/domain/project.rs` — Project enum (Active/Completed/Dropped), ProjectId, 13 unit tests
- `src/infrastructure/project_repository.rs` — CRUD + stalled detection + counts
- `src/services/project_service.rs` — full service layer
- `src/routes/projects.rs` — 9 route handlers with HTMX support
- `templates/projects.html`, `templates/project_item.html`, `templates/project_detail.html`, `templates/project_edit.html`, `templates/project_next_action_item.html`
- `static/css/main.css` — project component styles
- `static/js/project-focus.js` — focus management
- `tests/api/projects.rs` — 28 new integration tests
- `docs/glossary.md` — updated entries

Retro lessons applied: focus management JS and visible labels included from day one.

Remember: BLOCKING / Minor / Nice-to-have. Check what others have flagged before yours.
</teammate-message>

content.text: No new commits since 0143878. The team-lead's message is a repeat of the original review request, not a notification of fixes. My review has already been submitted. Let me inform the team-lead.

input.content:
Thanks — I have already completed my initial review of Step 6 at commit 0143878 and sent detailed feedback to Luca. No new commits have landed since then.

My review found **2 BLOCKING items** that must be fixed before I can give consensus:

1. **Focus management missing on project detail page** — `templates/project_detail.html` loads no focus management script. `project-focus.js` only covers the projects list page. When a user completes a next action on the detail page, the `<li>` is removed via HTMX outerHTML swap and focus falls to `<body>`. A `project-detail-focus.js` (or equivalent) is needed, scoped to `.project-action-item`, falling back to `#project-action-title`.

2. **Stalled flag text color fails WCAG AA contrast** — `.project-item__stalled-flag` in `static/css/main.css` (line 1803) uses `color: var(--color-warning)` (oklch 0.75) on `background: var(--color-warning-light)` (oklch 0.93), giving approximately 1.5–2:1 contrast ratio. WCAG AA requires 4.5:1 for text. Fix: change to `color: var(--color-fg)`.

I am standing by for re-review once Luca commits fixes for both.
input.summary: Already reviewed Step 6, 2 blocking items pending fixes

routing.summary: Already reviewed Step 6, 2 blocking items pending fixes
routing.content:
Thanks — I have already completed my initial review of Step 6 at commit 0143878 and sent detailed feedback to Luca. No new commits have landed since then.

My review found **2 BLOCKING items** that must be fixed before I can give consensus:

1. **Focus management missing on project detail page** — `templates/project_detail.html` loads no focus management script. `project-focus.js` only covers the projects list page. When a user completes a next action on the detail page, the `<li>` is removed via HTMX outerHTML swap and focus falls to `<body>`. A `project-detail-focus.js` (or equivalent) is needed, scoped to `.project-action-item`, falling back to `#project-action-title`.

2. **Stalled flag text color fails WCAG AA contrast** — `.project-item__stalled-flag` in `static/css/main.css` (line 1803) uses `color: var(--color-warning)` (oklch 0.75) on `background: var(--color-warning-light)` (oklch 0.93), giving approximately 1.5–2:1 contrast ratio. WCAG AA requires 4.5:1 for text. Fix: change to `color: var(--color-fg)`.

I am standing by for re-review once Luca commits fixes for both.

content.text: I have re-confirmed my review status to the team-lead. My initial Step 6 review is complete with 2 BLOCKING items identified. Waiting for Luca to apply fixes before I can re-review and give consensus approval.
